title: BFA Interaction Design: Me, Myself and A.I.
description: Explore thesis projects from CCA’s graduating Interaction Design seniors—the culmination of each student’s personal and collaborative work in the program. This year, several students investigated designing with artificial intelligence, with projects that examine AI’s impact on the future of work, its potential to conserve resources, and its influence on human relationships. Select projects from students, faculty, and the visiting artist are also on view in the Interactive Immersive Lab (Room 140).
